description:
You are a wholesale IT sales representative generating a proposal for a client. To satisfy their procurement requirements, you must logically separate software subscriptions from professional services on the quote. Create a new Quote in SuiteCRM (Username: admin / Password: Admin1234!) with the Title 'Q3 Infrastructure Quote - Tech Data', Quote Stage 'Draft', and Account 'Tech Data Corporation'. Organize the line items into two distinct groups:

Group 1: 'Software Subscriptions'
- Product: Red Hat Enterprise Linux (1 Year)
- Quantity: 20
- List Price: 799.00

Group 2: 'Professional Services'
- Product: Server Architecture Consulting (Hours)
- Quantity: 40
- List Price: 185.00

Save the completed quote.
